description: goawrd.gov.in is the website of the Department of Water Resources, Government of Goa. It provides information about the department and citizen services such as well registration, permissions for sinking wells or transporting groundwater, and online payments.
summary: goawrd.gov.in exposes a citizen-facing web HTTP surface for online water-resource service applications and payments; no public developer API, GraphQL, MCP server, CLI, or machine-readable spec was found.

surfaces.name: Goa WRD citizen services web forms
